# Data Collection

## Data Collection Framework

| Data Type | Method | Frequency | Responsible |
|---|---|---|---|
| Member Registration | Digital onboarding form | Continuous | IT Team |
| Savings Trends | Core banking reports | Monthly | Finance |
| Loan Performance | Loan management system | Weekly | Credit |
| Member Satisfaction | NPS surveys | Quarterly | M&E |
| Community Feedback | Focus groups | Bi-annually | Programs |

## Tools Used
- **KoBoToolbox** - field surveys
- **Google Data Studio** - dashboard reporting
- **Excel** - secondary data analysis
- **Power BI** - financial analytics

## Data Quality Assurance
- Double data entry for paper-based forms
- Automated validation rules in digital forms
- Monthly data audits by M&E officer
- Annual external data quality assessments
